site.title: ION Print & Promo | Real Estate Signs
site.description: Professional real estate sign services for real estate agents and brokers across Simcoe County. We design, print, install, and remove durable coroplast signs backed by 20+ years of experience (formerly Cardinal Signs & Gibson Digital Print).

hero.title: Real Estate Signs
hero.imageAlt: Real estate signs on a lawn

centreText.title: Your One-Stop Real Estate Sign Shop
centreText.description: We do it all – sign printing, posts, installs and take-downs - handled by the trusted team that agents know and trust.

features.title: Backed by Experience
features.description:
We have over 20 years of experience through our partnership with Cardinal Signs, formerly Gibson Digital Print.

We handle everything from durable coroplast printing and sturdy wooden posts, to custom sign toppers, full installation and take-down so your listings and properties get the visibility they need.

Be sure to check back for our FAQs (coming soon) for all the details and how to get signed up!
features.imageAlt: Real estate coroplast lawn sign installation

features.title: Sign Installs for Busy Realtors
features.description:
ION Print & Promo provides trusted real estate sign installation and take-down services for realtors, agents and brokerages. We help wiith:

  • Real estate sign installation
  • Sign take-downs
  • Custom toppers & sign printing
  • Service routes across Barrie & Simcoe County
features.imageAlt: Sign post installation in front yard

features.title: Real Estate Printing
features.description:
We print all sizes of real estate signs, custom toppers, sold signs, open house signs, directional signs and A-frames designed to stand up to the elements! We use tough coroplast and laminate it for extra durability.

We also support agents and brokers with everyday print materials to market their listings and build their business.

This includes feature sheets, business cards, postcards, door hangers, presentation folders and custom brokerage materials.
features.imageAlt: Real estate coroplast lawn sign installation

features.title: Promo Products & Gifts
features.description:
Print & Promo helps sales agents and brokers create useful branded promo products and thoughtful client gifts that keep your name in front of buyers, sellers and neighbours.

  • Branded pens, notepads & magnets
  • Closing gifts & thank-you items
  • Open house giveaways
  • Key tags & home-related promo items
  • Brokerage-branded merchandise
features.imageAlt: Sign post installation in front yard

messages.surcharge: Contact us for more information and pricing.
messages.outsideSub: Contact us for more information and pricing.

_accordions.title: How fast can you turn around sign orders?
_accordions.content: Most standard coroplast and aluminum signs are ready within 2–3 business days. Rush turnarounds are available — contact us to discuss your timeline.

_accordions.title: How quickly can you install after printing?
_accordions.content: We typically schedule installation within 1–2 business days of sign completion. We'll confirm a time that works with your listing schedule.

_accordions.title: Do you handle sign removal after a sale?
_accordions.content: Yes. Once your listing closes, just give us a call or send an email and we'll arrange prompt removal. We can also set up automatic removal scheduling if you prefer.

_accordions.title: Can you set up a program for our whole brokerage?
_accordions.content: Absolutely. We work with brokerages to create templated sign programs so every agent's materials are on-brand and easy to order. Reach out to discuss volume pricing and setup.

_accordions.title: What rider panels do you offer?
_accordions.content: We print standard riders (Sold, Open House, Price Reduced, For Lease, etc.) as well as fully custom riders with agent names, phone numbers, or brokerage branding.

cta.heading: Ready to put your listings in the spotlight?
